# truenas_vms (Data Source)

Lists all virtual machines on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_vms" "all" {}

output "vm_names" {
  value = [for v in data.truenas_vms.all.vms : v.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `vms` (Attributes List) List of virtual machines. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vms))

<a id="nestedatt--vms"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vms`

Read-Only:

- `cores` (Number) Cores per socket.
- `id` (Number) VM ID.
- `memory` (Number) Memory in bytes.
- `name` (String) VM name.
- `state` (String) Current runtime state.
- `vcpus` (Number) Virtual CPU count.
